text:
There once was a girl named Ruby. She lived in a house filled with cats. One day, she discovered she had a mysterious illness. It made her speak only cats' thoughts. Luckily for Ruby, she knew a wise old cat named Felix.

Felix befriended Ruby. Together they planned fun cat-only chats. Ruby learned a lot about cats from Felix. They bonded over tasty treats.

One day Ruby heard some bad news. Cats were disappearing. She felt scared. Felix reassured her.

They devised a plan. Felix taught Ruby how to whistle. Together they sang a special song just for cats.

The cats loved it! More cats began visiting Ruby's yard. Friends came out of hiding.

Ruby learned her illness wasn't serious. Cats loved her.

From that day on, Ruby spent her days chatting with friends.

That's all.

Ruby loved kittens.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
